title: Outlast
lyrics: Outlast, Outlast, Hellast, Hellacious When you come and talk to me, I outlast, I outcast I outdo anything if you want me to construe the you Knowledge, information, Outlast, you is proper confirmation It's just a calibration, calibration of the mind And you see that you could be better, but you stayed in, that you're gnarly Gonna outlast the hate, gonna outlast the bait Gonna outlast you, outlasting me, I don't think that could be true Cause I know I come with the love, and I know I won't rise above our equal To bring motherfuckers with me, no treatment of evil Look, Outlast, your base, fight the breeze, fight yourself and I'll Positive, positive, who wraps around you Don't be negative, I said but it's hard to Can you show me the way, the power, we outlast 3Z, I don't think so, bring your brother down Help him build a bridge, over the alliance Gonna outlast it all, I made it fall in love with my name Hope you got stereo to hear my sound, just go back to the brisk I don't talk shit about you, you all got up, we all got fed We all people thinking that we're not the man, we're not one like that Self-individual love you gotta have, be autonomous Don't ruin anyone else shot at the goal, yeah Money brought you down, gotta outlast it Hate brought you down, you gotta outlast it Come true, forget what you feel I know we're all on the same deal Outlast the haters, outlast people angered Outlast me as I outlast the true crime If you don't care, if you came here with a frown I just wish you would just stay in town Recognize greatness in the sound Outlast it all I'm gonna outlast me, it's my thoughts and energy As it goes spectacularly from one point to another All across universes and a time to a university In your mind, not pinnacle to me, I can't see Progress, anyway Then again, are you even looking my way? Oh, you sleep on this Strangers come from the abyss, took you out in the night Now there's number one outlast in the outlaster Outlooks another group famous for the deaths, deaths of all of us Outlast the hate from all of you I know you're hatin' right now Cause I look so fuckin' good I'll outlast all your hate I'll come back with a fire alarm Time to bake that motherfucker, here's where we came from That doesn't mean it's good, at all Uh, you have a refund policy? I need my money back

It's just a calibration, calibration of the mind

Gonna outlast you, outlasting me, I don't think that could be true
Cause I know I come with the love, and I know I won't rise above our equal

Don't ruin anyone else shot at the goal, yeah
Money brought you down, gotta outlast it
Hate brought you down, you gotta outlast it
Come true, forget what you feel
I know we're all on the same deal
Outlast the haters, outlast people angered
Outlast me as I outlast the true crime
If you don't care, if you came here with a frown
I just wish you would just stay in town
Recognize greatness in the sound
Outlast it all
I'm gonna outlast me, it's my thoughts and energy
As it goes spectacularly from one point to another
